name: Asparagus Cream Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, melt CRISCO. Add onion and cook until tender.
2. Add frozen asparagus and chicken broth; cook uncovered for 10 minutes over high heat.
3. Transfer the mixture to a blender and puree (or force through a fine wire sieve). Add beaten egg yolks.
4. Return the mixture to the saucepan. Stir in milk, salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Reheat before serving; do not boil.
Makes 3 quarts.
